agents.scope: Exhaustive source-first review of OpenSpec change add-steering-tuning-media-observability checkpoint 3 attempt 1, limited to runtime dual-channel publish behavior for tasks 3.1-3.4: assistant control priority over media, preservation of accepted command/ack/state/telemetry semantics, and runtime evidence proving control/media coexistence plus safe media-disconnect cleanup.
